Kadir Has University in the Top 100 in the World Rankings in Two Titles

Kadir Has University was ranked among the best by Times Higher Education (THE), which is considered one of the most prestigious higher education rating organizations in the world.

Kadir Has University ranked 42nd in the

“Gender Equality”

category and 77th in the

“Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions”

category of THE Impact Rankings 2024 World Rankings, announced by Times Higher Education and ranking universities based on “Sustainable Development Goals”, thus achieving success in entering the top 100 in the world in both categories.

Among the Top 3 Universities in Turkey

Kadir Has University; In the THE Impact Rankings 2024 Turkey ranking, among foundation universities, it ranked 1st in the category of

“Decent Work and Economic Growth”

, 2nd in the categories of

“Gender Equality”

and

“Sustainable Cities and Communities”

, and 3rd in the categories of

“Reducing Inequalities”

,

“Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure”

and

“Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions”

.

The number of universities in the general ranking increased from 1,591 to 1,963 in the world and from 79 to 91 in Turkey, compared to the 2023 ranking. Our university also took place in the world rankings in the 201-300 category under the titles of

“Quality Education,” “Decent Work and Economic Growth,”

“Sustainable Cities and Communities,”

and

“Reducing Inequalities,”

in the 301-400 category under the title of “Partnerships for Purposes,” and in the 401-600 category under the title of

“Industry, Innovation, and Infrastructure.”

‘A Pride for Our University’

Kadir Has University President Prof. Dr. Sondan Durukanoğlu Feyiz, in his statement on the subject, said, “It has always made us happy that universities in our country receive such good rankings in rankings made by institutions accepted all over the world. Of course, it is a source of pride for us that Kadir Has University is in the top 100 in two rankings today.”
